So today we will have this case study.
So I will display this case and then after that we will have a discussion.
Shraddha is the only devotee from family who attends Gita live sessions every week and she is chanting regularly.
She faces constant pressure from her family to skip the Gita live sessions and instead join the family outing over the weekends.
She is even mocked at home while she chants and performs her chanting.
People make fun of her.
